BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains a recent press meet where Donald Trump admitted that the strength of Iran was underestimated at the start of the conflict. He noted that Iran’s military preparedness and missile positioning surprised the U.S. The video also discusses the reported resignation of Joseph Kent, who raised concerns about the direction of the war. Many people in the United States are questioning whether the conflict is necessary and how many lives could be lost. It also covers rising tensions in Afghanistan, including reports of a deadly hospital attack and ongoing regional accusations. With growing criticism and expanding conflict zones, will this war continue or is pressure building for a major shift in strategy?

Raw Talks with VK is the 1st Telugu podcast channel dedicated to Building an Intellectual Telugu community.

item.title: 🔥🔥. #telugupodcast #rrrshow #indianarmy
item.description:
In this impactful telugu podcast episode on lazymuscle RRRshow, host Rohit Gollena brings an exclusive conversation with NSG Major General Ravi Ravada (Retd.), offering rare insights into India’s elite counter-terrorism force and the realities of modern warfare. This episode begins with a clear explanation of what is NSG, its role in national security, and why it is considered India’s ultimate tactical response unit for terror threats and hostage rescue missions. The discussion takes a deep dive into how NSG handled the Mumbai 26/11 attacks, covering operational planning, on-ground challenges, and lessons learned from one of the most complex counter-terror operations in Indian history. Major General Ravi Ravada explains the structure and purpose of the Black Tornado unit and the highly specialized 51 SAG, shedding light on how these commandos are trained to operate in high-risk urban environments. A powerful emotional segment focuses on Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, the sofa associated with his final stand during 26/11, and the meaning of supreme sacrifice. This part of the telugu podcast reflects the emotional strength required by soldiers and the unseen cost paid by their families and comrades. The episode also explores the hardest NSG training routines and compares them with the even more demanding training of Indian PARA SF. From physical endurance to mental resilience, this conversation reveals why only the toughest soldiers qualify for elite forces. Major General Ravi Ravada shares experiences from missions he was involved in, leadership lessons from the battlefield, and decision-making under extreme pressure. Strategic national security topics such as the Uri surgical strike, ongoing issues at the India-China border, and evolving military threats are discussed in detail. Viewers will also learn about different types of weapons used in the Indian Army, the technological superiority and greatness of the BrahMos missile, and its importance in India’s defense doctrine. This rohith gollena hosted lazymuscle episode concludes with a discussion on the toughest emotional moment faced by a soldier, making this episode a must-watch telugu podcast for defense aspirants, patriotic youth, and anyone interested in India’s military power and real-life heroism.
#NSG #MajorGeneralRaviRavada #26_11Attacks #BlackTornado #51SAG #IndianSpecialForces #ParaSF #IndianArmy #BrahMos #UriSurgicalStrike #IndiaChinaBorder #DefensePodcast #TeluguPodcast #LazyMuscle #RRRshow #RohithGollena #operationsindoor #motivation #army #armylover #armystatus #armylife #armymotivation #nsg #nsgcommando #mumbaiattacks #26/11attacks #indianarmy #republicday #indianarmy #majorpodcast #teluguarmypodcast

item.description:
#shorts #ytshorts #incogshorts #playlikeincognito #youtubeshorts
👉 DESCRIPTION: This video is made purely for fun and entertainment. In this Telugu roast, we take a light-hearted look at the Instagram personality known as Jr Sai Pallavi. The intention of this video is not to spread hate or target anyone personally.
The first half of the video is just a fun roast, but the real point of the video comes in the second half. On Instagram, many innocent creators post reels and receive negative comments. Instead of ignoring them, some people start making angry response reels and shouting at the audience, which only creates more negativity and drama.
The message here is simple: not every comment deserves a reaction. Sometimes the best thing to do is ignore the noise and keep doing your thing.
Watch till the end and let me know what you think in the comments.

item.title: Ludwig
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ludwig.

Can accidental detective John 'Ludwig' Taylor crack the biggest puzzle of his life - finding his missing brother?

item.title: Welcome to Chippendales
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Welcome to Chippendales.

A sprawling true-crime saga, Welcome to Chippendales tells the outrageous story of Somen "Steve" Banerjee, an Indian immigrant who became the unlikely founder of the world's greatest male-stripping empire - and let nothing stand in his way in the process. The series details the insane, darkly comedic, crime-ridden story behind the unique male revue that became a cultural phenomenon.

item.title: The Beauty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Beauty.

When international supermodels begin dying in gruesome and mysterious ways, two FBI agents are sent to Paris, Venice, Rome and New York to uncover the truth behind these deaths and end up discovering a conspiracy that threatens the future of humanity.

item.title: CIA
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: CIA.

CIA centers on two unlikely partners — a fast-talking, rule-breaking loose cannon CIA case officer, and a by-the-book, seasoned and smart FBI agent who believes in the rule of law. When this odd couple are assigned to work out of CIA's New York Station, they must learn to work together to investigate cases and criminals posing threats on U.S. soil, finding that their differences may actually be their strength.

item.title: Marshals
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Marshals.

Marshals stars Luke Grimes reprising his role as Kayce Dutton. With the Yellowstone Ranch behind him, Dutton joins an elite unit of U.S. Marshals, combining his skills as a cowboy and Navy SEAL to bring range justice to Montana. Kayce and his teammates - Pete Calvin, Belle Skinner, Andrea Cruz and Miles Kittle - must balance the high psychological cost of serving as the last line of defense in the region's war on violence with their duty to their families, which for Kayce includes his son Tate and his confidants Thomas Rainwater and Mo from the Broken Rock reservation.

item.title: The Tragic Story of Musi River | Sr journalist Suresh kochattil | Rohith Gollena #telugupodcast
item.description:
In this engaging telugu podcast episode on lazymuscle and RRRshow, host Rohit Gollena speaks with guest Suresh Kochattil about realities that most people notice every day but rarely question. The conversation opens with an important message for viewers, setting the tone for a deep and honest discussion about what really happens behind common scenes we see on the streets. It feels like a direct talk with the audience, asking us to stop, observe, and think. They begin by breaking down how organized begging networks actually work. Instead of seeing begging as a random act, the episode explains how it is often structured and controlled by groups that profit from human suffering. From there, the discussion moves naturally into illegal human trade and exploitation, helping Telugu audiences understand how vulnerable people are trapped and used by these hidden systems. The aim is not just to shock, but to create awareness and empathy. The talk then shifts to public safety and everyday risks in city life, with references to incidents around Lumbini Park and Gokul Chat. These examples make the conversation feel close to home for Hyderabad viewers. It becomes less of a theory and more of a real-life warning about how crowded public places can become targets when crime networks operate freely. From there, the episode questions the punishment and justice system. Are punishments truly discouraging crime, or are they too weak to stop powerful networks? The guest and host discuss this in a simple, relatable way, as if talking to a friend who is confused about why crimes keep repeating. This naturally leads into how phone surveillance works and how authorities track calls and digital activity, helping viewers understand both the power and the limits of technology in fighting crime. The conversation also touches on Musi River pollution, not just as an environmental issue but as a result of deeper political and illegal activities. It explains how neglect, corruption, and hidden interests damage natural resources that affect millions of people. The discussion then moves to real estate scams and illegal networks, showing how land, money, and influence are tightly connected in India’s urban growth story. Hawala and underground money transfers are explained in a clear and simple way, so even first-time listeners can understand how black money moves without banks. This part of the telugu podcast is especially useful for young people, business owners, and professionals who want to stay away from risky financial traps and understand how illegal money systems work in real life. Towards the end, the mood becomes more personal. The guest shares the best advice he ever received, and then offers practical advice directly to viewers. It feels like a calm wrap-up after a heavy discussion, reminding everyone that awareness is the first step toward safety and change. If you follow rohith gollena and enjoy meaningful content from lazymuscle and RRRshow, this telugu podcast episode is made for you. It talks about crime, public safety, money systems, and environment in a way that feels like a conversation, not a lecture. Watch it fully to understand how hidden networks influence daily life and why informed citizens play a key role in building a safer society.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #rrrshow #rohithgollena #teluguinterviews #telugupodcastclips #indianpodcast #hyderabadpodcast #socialissuesindia #crimeawareness #begging #publicsafety #hawalasystem #blackmoneyindia #realestatescams #justiceandinjustice #phonetappingcase #musiriver #urbancrime #telugucontent #telugucreator #teluguyoutube #awarenesspodcast

item.title: ROASTING INTERNET QUEENS 👑 | MUST WATCH 😂
item.description:
👉 DESCRIPTION: This video is made purely for fun and entertainment. In this Telugu roast, we take a light-hearted look at the Instagram personality known as Jr Sai Pallavi. The intention of this video is not to spread hate or target anyone personally.
The first half of the video is just a fun roast, but the real point of the video comes in the second half. On Instagram, many innocent creators post reels and receive negative comments. Instead of ignoring them, some people start making angry response reels and shouting at the audience, which only creates more negativity and drama.
The message here is simple: not every comment deserves a reaction. Sometimes the best thing to do is ignore the noise and keep doing your thing.

item.title: 90% Of Azure EXPLAINED In 20 Minutes | COMPLETE Crash Course For Beginners
item.description:
In this video, I break down Microsoft Azure into 7 core service buckets so you can understand the platform without feeling overwhelmed.
I’ve covered the most important Azure services across identity and security, compute, containers, storage, databases, networking, DevOps automation, AI services, and monitoring. I also explain when to use services like Azure VMs, AKS, Azure Functions, Blob Storage, Cosmos DB, VNet, Azure OpenAI, and Azure Monitor in real-world cloud architectures.
If you’re a college student or a working professional aiming for top tech companies and want a clear roadmap for learning Azure and building real cloud projects, this video is for you.

item.description:

BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains the rising issues with petrol and diesel availability and prices in major Indian cities like Bengaluru, Mumbai, and Chennai. The increase is linked to tensions in the Middle East, especially around the Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil shipping route. A recent survey in the United States showed that only about 25% of people support the attack on Iran, while most oppose it. Many analysts believe the conflict could last from six months to a year, although Donald Trump said it might end within a few weeks. The video also explains how LPG and LNG supply disruptions could affect common people. With warnings spreading across the Middle East, will this conflict remain limited or could it trigger a wider global energy crisis?

item.title: True💯. #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #sureshkochattil
item.description:
In this engaging telugu podcast episode on lazymuscle and RRRshow, host Rohit Gollena speaks with guest Suresh Kochattil about realities that most people notice every day but rarely question. The conversation opens with an important message for viewers, setting the tone for a deep and honest discussion about what really happens behind common scenes we see on the streets. It feels like a direct talk with the audience, asking us to stop, observe, and think. They begin by breaking down how organized begging networks actually work. Instead of seeing begging as a random act, the episode explains how it is often structured and controlled by groups that profit from human suffering. From there, the discussion moves naturally into illegal human trade and exploitation, helping Telugu audiences understand how vulnerable people are trapped and used by these hidden systems. The aim is not just to shock, but to create awareness and empathy. The talk then shifts to public safety and everyday risks in city life, with references to incidents around Lumbini Park and Gokul Chat. These examples make the conversation feel close to home for Hyderabad viewers. It becomes less of a theory and more of a real-life warning about how crowded public places can become targets when crime networks operate freely. From there, the episode questions the punishment and justice system. Are punishments truly discouraging crime, or are they too weak to stop powerful networks? The guest and host discuss this in a simple, relatable way, as if talking to a friend who is confused about why crimes keep repeating. This naturally leads into how phone surveillance works and how authorities track calls and digital activity, helping viewers understand both the power and the limits of technology in fighting crime. The conversation also touches on Musi River pollution, not just as an environmental issue but as a result of deeper political and illegal activities. It explains how neglect, corruption, and hidden interests damage natural resources that affect millions of people. The discussion then moves to real estate scams and illegal networks, showing how land, money, and influence are tightly connected in India’s urban growth story. Hawala and underground money transfers are explained in a clear and simple way, so even first-time listeners can understand how black money moves without banks. This part of the telugu podcast is especially useful for young people, business owners, and professionals who want to stay away from risky financial traps and understand how illegal money systems work in real life. Towards the end, the mood becomes more personal. The guest shares the best advice he ever received, and then offers practical advice directly to viewers. It feels like a calm wrap-up after a heavy discussion, reminding everyone that awareness is the first step toward safety and change. If you follow rohith gollena and enjoy meaningful content from lazymuscle and RRRshow, this telugu podcast episode is made for you. It talks about crime, public safety, money systems, and environment in a way that feels like a conversation, not a lecture. Watch it fully to understand how hidden networks influence daily life and why informed citizens play a key role in building a safer society.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #rrrshow #rohithgollena #teluguinterviews #telugupodcastclips #indianpodcast #hyderabadpodcast #socialissuesindia #crimeawareness #begging #publicsafety #hawalasystem #blackmoneyindia #realestatescams #justiceandinjustice #phonetappingcase #musiriver #urbancrime #telugucontent #telugucreator #teluguyoutube #awarenesspodcast

item.title: 🚨WAR STOPS ? 🤯 Iran puts 3 CONDITIONS 😨| What are they ? 🤔| Aye Jude ✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains recent developments in the conflict involving United States, Israel, and Iran. During a political rally, Donald Trump claimed that the war had been won and referred to it as “Epic Fury.” Meanwhile, Iranian officials warned that crude oil prices could rise close to $200 per barrel if tensions continue. The G7 countries are trying to stabilize oil supply and control prices globally. India’s External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar also held discussions with Iran’s foreign minister to ensure the safe release of an Indian-linked vessel near the Strait of Hormuz. With Iran setting conditions to end the war, the big question now is will diplomacy succeed before the crisis escalates again?

item.title: World's HEAVIEST phone case!
😳15 Crores ah Okka Flat ⁉️#telugupodcast | Rohith Gollena | Suresh Kochattil
item.description:
In this engaging episode of the telugu podcast on the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host rohith gollena sits down with senior journalist Suresh Kochattil for an in-depth conversation about the rapidly evolving real estate landscape in Hyderabad. Known for his sharp analysis and decades of journalistic experience, Suresh Kochattil shares valuable insights into how Hyderabad has become one of India’s most dynamic real estate markets. This episode on the lazymuscle platform explores the reasons behind the city’s explosive growth, the role of infrastructure development, and why investors across India are increasingly looking toward Hyderabad as a real estate hotspot. For viewers who follow the RRRshow and enjoy meaningful discussions on business, economy, and society through a telugu podcast format, this episode offers deep knowledge and practical understanding. Hyderabad’s real estate boom has been driven by multiple factors including IT expansion, global investments, improved infrastructure, and government policies. In this conversation with rohith gollena, Suresh Kochattil explains how the IT corridor, startup ecosystem, and multinational companies have transformed the city’s housing demand. The discussion also highlights key areas such as Gachibowli, Kondapur, Financial District, Kokapet, and emerging suburbs that are attracting investors and homebuyers. Through the RRRshow format, this telugu podcast breaks down complex real estate trends in a way that is easy for the Telugu-speaking audience to understand. Viewers will gain insights into property appreciation trends, residential demand, commercial growth, and how Hyderabad compares with other major Indian cities like Bangalore, Mumbai, and Chennai. Another important topic discussed in this lazymuscle podcast episode is the perspective of first-time homebuyers and young investors. Many people in the Telugu community are curious about whether this is the right time to buy property in Hyderabad. Suresh Kochattil shares his perspective on market cycles, price growth, and the importance of location, infrastructure connectivity, and future development plans. Host rohith gollena also raises questions that many viewers of the RRRshow often ask, such as the risks involved in real estate investment, the difference between investment property and residential purchase, and the long-term value of land versus apartments. This telugu podcast aims to provide clarity for anyone interested in real estate investment, property buying decisions, and the economic factors shaping Hyderabad’s growth. The conversation also touches on how government initiatives like infrastructure expansion, metro connectivity, ring roads, and technology parks are influencing property demand. Hyderabad’s transformation into a global IT and innovation hub has played a major role in attracting professionals from across India. As discussed in this episode of the RRRshow, this migration is creating strong demand for both rental housing and long-term property investment. Suresh Kochattil explains how investors should evaluate growth corridors, upcoming projects, and economic trends before making property decisions. Through the lazymuscle platform, rohith gollena ensures that this telugu podcast delivers valuable insights not just for investors but also for entrepreneurs, professionals, and anyone curious about Hyderabad’s economic growth story. One of the highlights of this episode is the broader discussion about how media narratives influence public perception of real estate. As a senior journalist, Suresh Kochattil provides a unique perspective on how market hype, speculation, and genuine growth differ. He explains why Hyderabad has maintained relative stability compared to other real estate markets and why long-term planning and infrastructure development are critical for sustainable growth. The RRRshow continues its mission of bringing meaningful conversations to the Telugu audience through the lazymuscle channel, and this telugu podcast episode with rohith gollena offers valuable context for understanding the future of Hyderabad real estate.

In this video, Aye Jude explains how the ongoing conflict involving United States, Israel, and Iran could affect essential commodities used by common people. Reports mention an attack near a desalination plant on Bahrain Island, raising concerns about regional stability. Rising crude oil prices and disruptions near the Strait of Hormuz could increase LPG and fuel costs in India. The video also explains how government regulations under the Essential Commodities Act of 1955 could influence prices of items like textiles, fertilizers, and hotel services. At the same time, energy investments such as new refineries in Texas and global partnerships by companies like Reliance Industries are shaping the energy market. If supply disruptions continue, could everyday expenses for people rise even further in the coming weeks?

item.title: hyderabad💔 #telugupodcast #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sureshkochattil
item.description:
In this engaging telugu podcast episode on lazymuscle and RRRshow, host Rohit Gollena speaks with guest Suresh Kochattil about realities that most people notice every day but rarely question. The conversation opens with an important message for viewers, setting the tone for a deep and honest discussion about what really happens behind common scenes we see on the streets. It feels like a direct talk with the audience, asking us to stop, observe, and think. They begin by breaking down how organized begging networks actually work. Instead of seeing begging as a random act, the episode explains how it is often structured and controlled by groups that profit from human suffering. From there, the discussion moves naturally into illegal human trade and exploitation, helping Telugu audiences understand how vulnerable people are trapped and used by these hidden systems. The aim is not just to shock, but to create awareness and empathy. The talk then shifts to public safety and everyday risks in city life, with references to incidents around Lumbini Park and Gokul Chat. These examples make the conversation feel close to home for Hyderabad viewers. It becomes less of a theory and more of a real-life warning about how crowded public places can become targets when crime networks operate freely. From there, the episode questions the punishment and justice system. Are punishments truly discouraging crime, or are they too weak to stop powerful networks? The guest and host discuss this in a simple, relatable way, as if talking to a friend who is confused about why crimes keep repeating. This naturally leads into how phone surveillance works and how authorities track calls and digital activity, helping viewers understand both the power and the limits of technology in fighting crime. The conversation also touches on Musi River pollution, not just as an environmental issue but as a result of deeper political and illegal activities. It explains how neglect, corruption, and hidden interests damage natural resources that affect millions of people. The discussion then moves to real estate scams and illegal networks, showing how land, money, and influence are tightly connected in India’s urban growth story. Hawala and underground money transfers are explained in a clear and simple way, so even first-time listeners can understand how black money moves without banks. This part of the telugu podcast is especially useful for young people, business owners, and professionals who want to stay away from risky financial traps and understand how illegal money systems work in real life. Towards the end, the mood becomes more personal. The guest shares the best advice he ever received, and then offers practical advice directly to viewers. It feels like a calm wrap-up after a heavy discussion, reminding everyone that awareness is the first step toward safety and change. If you follow rohith gollena and enjoy meaningful content from lazymuscle and RRRshow, this telugu podcast episode is made for you. It talks about crime, public safety, money systems, and environment in a way that feels like a conversation, not a lecture. Watch it fully to understand how hidden networks influence daily life and why informed citizens play a key role in building a safer society.

item.title: Evaridhi antaru ? #telugupodcast #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sureshkochattil
item.description:
In this engaging telugu podcast episode on lazymuscle and RRRshow, host Rohit Gollena speaks with guest Suresh Kochattil about realities that most people notice every day but rarely question. The conversation opens with an important message for viewers, setting the tone for a deep and honest discussion about what really happens behind common scenes we see on the streets. It feels like a direct talk with the audience, asking us to stop, observe, and think. They begin by breaking down how organized begging networks actually work. Instead of seeing begging as a random act, the episode explains how it is often structured and controlled by groups that profit from human suffering. From there, the discussion moves naturally into illegal human trade and exploitation, helping Telugu audiences understand how vulnerable people are trapped and used by these hidden systems. The aim is not just to shock, but to create awareness and empathy. The talk then shifts to public safety and everyday risks in city life, with references to incidents around Lumbini Park and Gokul Chat. These examples make the conversation feel close to home for Hyderabad viewers. It becomes less of a theory and more of a real-life warning about how crowded public places can become targets when crime networks operate freely. From there, the episode questions the punishment and justice system. Are punishments truly discouraging crime, or are they too weak to stop powerful networks? The guest and host discuss this in a simple, relatable way, as if talking to a friend who is confused about why crimes keep repeating. This naturally leads into how phone surveillance works and how authorities track calls and digital activity, helping viewers understand both the power and the limits of technology in fighting crime. The conversation also touches on Musi River pollution, not just as an environmental issue but as a result of deeper political and illegal activities. It explains how neglect, corruption, and hidden interests damage natural resources that affect millions of people. The discussion then moves to real estate scams and illegal networks, showing how land, money, and influence are tightly connected in India’s urban growth story. Hawala and underground money transfers are explained in a clear and simple way, so even first-time listeners can understand how black money moves without banks. This part of the telugu podcast is especially useful for young people, business owners, and professionals who want to stay away from risky financial traps and understand how illegal money systems work in real life. Towards the end, the mood becomes more personal. The guest shares the best advice he ever received, and then offers practical advice directly to viewers. It feels like a calm wrap-up after a heavy discussion, reminding everyone that awareness is the first step toward safety and change. If you follow rohith gollena and enjoy meaningful content from lazymuscle and RRRshow, this telugu podcast episode is made for you. It talks about crime, public safety, money systems, and environment in a way that feels like a conversation, not a lecture. Watch it fully to understand how hidden networks influence daily life and why informed citizens play a key role in building a safer society.

item.title: 7 Cloud Networking Concepts Explained In 90 Seconds | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: 7 Cloud Networking Concepts Explained In 90 Seconds
If you want to ace your interview, you must learn these topics:
1. VPC: Your own private space in the cloud where only you control who can enter or access your systems.
2. Subnets: Smaller sections inside your cloud space that decide which systems are public and which stay private.
3. Route Tables: Traffic rules that decide where data should go to the internet, to another section, or stay inside.
4. Internet Gateway: The main door that allows your public systems to connect to the internet.
5. NAT Gateway: A safe exit that lets private systems access the internet without exposing them publicly.
6. Firewalls: Security guards that check traffic and decide what is allowed in or out.
7. Load Balancers: Traffic managers that spread incoming requests across multiple servers so nothing gets overloaded.
Don’t just define these components; explain how they work together in a production setup.
Leave a like, comment, share, and subscribe for more such content!
Follow me also on, Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: 😳Hyderabad Bomb Blasts Lo em jarigindhi ⁉️ #telugupodcast #rrrshow #rohithgollena
item.description:
This episode of the RRRshow on lazymuscle features an in-depth conversation with senior journalist Suresh Kochattil, hosted by Rohit Gollena. In this telugu podcast, the discussion focuses on bomb blasts in India, the history of terror attacks, and how such incidents have shaped India’s political, social, and security landscape. Through the lens of journalism and ground reporting, Suresh Kochattil shares insights into the realities behind terrorism investigations, intelligence failures, and how media narratives influence public perception. If you are interested in understanding the deeper context behind major incidents in India, this episode of RRRshow on lazymuscle offers a thoughtful and analytical perspective for Telugu audiences.
India has faced multiple terror incidents over the decades, from coordinated urban attacks to isolated bomb explosions that shook the nation. In this telugu podcast, Rohit Gollena and Suresh Kochattil explore the history of bomb blasts in India, including the evolution of terror networks, geopolitical tensions, and internal security challenges. The conversation also touches on the investigative process followed by security agencies, how intelligence systems work, and the role of journalists in reporting sensitive issues responsibly. Through this detailed discussion, listeners gain a clearer understanding of how terrorism impacts society, governance, and national security.
Senior journalist Suresh Kochattil brings years of experience covering political developments, conflict zones, and investigative stories. In this RRRshow episode, he explains how terror incidents are analyzed by journalists, how misinformation spreads during crises, and why critical thinking is important for citizens consuming news. Rohit Gollena guides the discussion in a way that makes complex issues easy to understand for Telugu viewers. This episode of lazymuscle is designed for audiences who want more than headlines and want to explore the deeper realities behind bomb blasts, terrorism debates, and national security discussions in India.
The conversation also dives into the psychological and social impact of terror attacks, how communities react to fear and uncertainty, and how governments respond with policy changes and security reforms. From historical attacks to modern counter-terrorism strategies, the discussion provides context that helps viewers understand the broader picture. This telugu podcast episode of RRRshow emphasizes informed dialogue, responsible journalism, and the importance of understanding complex issues without sensationalism.
If you enjoy meaningful conversations, investigative journalism insights, and deep discussions on national issues, this episode of lazymuscle hosted by Rohit Gollena is for you. The RRRshow continues to bring thought-provoking discussions with experts, journalists, and analysts who share real perspectives on important topics. Watch the full episode to gain insights into the history of bomb blasts in India, terrorism analysis, and the role of media in shaping public understanding.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #RRRshow #rohithgollena #rohitgollena #sureshkochattil #bombblastsinindia #indiaterrorattacks #terrorismanalysis #indiapolitics #journalisminterview #indiacurrentaffairs #podcasttelugu #indiasecurity #terrorattackhistory

item.title: 🚨 BREAKING 🚨 IRAN is FINISHED 🤯| TRUMP announced WW3 😨| Aye Jude ✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains reports of intense conflict in Tehran, where attacks allegedly targeted major oil reserve areas, causing massive fires and thick smoke across the sky. During a press meet, Donald Trump was questioned by a journalist about reports of a school strike in Iran that reportedly killed many children, and he blamed Iran for the incident. The war has also affected nearby regions, including Dubai, where economic and infrastructure disruptions have been reported. Protests have taken place near the White House as people demand an end to the conflict. Meanwhile, thousands of civilians from Middle Eastern countries have reportedly returned to India for safety. As the humanitarian and economic impact grows, the question remains how far will this conflict spread?

item.title: ‼️🚨NUCLEAR WAR STARTED !!! USA Tests DOOMSDAY Minuteman 3 Missile🤯 | Aye Jude ✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains reports about the Iranian naval ship IRIS Dena, which was allegedly attacked by a U.S. submarine in the Indian Ocean, leading to heavy casualties. The ship had earlier participated in the MILAN 2026 Naval Exercise hosted by India. U.S. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth addressed the issue in a press conference, while the United States also conducted a test of the LGM-30G Minuteman III near the Marshall Islands. The video also discusses India’s position in the ongoing conflict and its diplomatic response following reports about Ali Khamenei. Rising tensions near the Strait of Hormuz could push crude oil and LNG prices higher. With Russia offering large crude oil supplies to India, how will this conflict reshape global energy and diplomacy?

item.title: ⁉️How Politicians Will Take advantage of this | Sr journalist Suresh kochattil #telugupodcast
item.description:
In this engaging telugu podcast episode on lazymuscle and RRRshow, host Rohit Gollena speaks with guest Suresh Kochattil about realities that most people notice every day but rarely question. The conversation opens with an important message for viewers, setting the tone for a deep and honest discussion about what really happens behind common scenes we see on the streets. It feels like a direct talk with the audience, asking us to stop, observe, and think. They begin by breaking down how organized begging networks actually work. Instead of seeing begging as a random act, the episode explains how it is often structured and controlled by groups that profit from human suffering. From there, the discussion moves naturally into illegal human trade and exploitation, helping Telugu audiences understand how vulnerable people are trapped and used by these hidden systems. The aim is not just to shock, but to create awareness and empathy. The talk then shifts to public safety and everyday risks in city life, with references to incidents around Lumbini Park and Gokul Chat. These examples make the conversation feel close to home for Hyderabad viewers. It becomes less of a theory and more of a real-life warning about how crowded public places can become targets when crime networks operate freely. From there, the episode questions the punishment and justice system. Are punishments truly discouraging crime, or are they too weak to stop powerful networks? The guest and host discuss this in a simple, relatable way, as if talking to a friend who is confused about why crimes keep repeating. This naturally leads into how phone surveillance works and how authorities track calls and digital activity, helping viewers understand both the power and the limits of technology in fighting crime. The conversation also touches on Musi River pollution, not just as an environmental issue but as a result of deeper political and illegal activities. It explains how neglect, corruption, and hidden interests damage natural resources that affect millions of people. The discussion then moves to real estate scams and illegal networks, showing how land, money, and influence are tightly connected in India’s urban growth story. Hawala and underground money transfers are explained in a clear and simple way, so even first-time listeners can understand how black money moves without banks. This part of the telugu podcast is especially useful for young people, business owners, and professionals who want to stay away from risky financial traps and understand how illegal money systems work in real life. Towards the end, the mood becomes more personal. The guest shares the best advice he ever received, and then offers practical advice directly to viewers. It feels like a calm wrap-up after a heavy discussion, reminding everyone that awareness is the first step toward safety and change. If you follow rohith gollena and enjoy meaningful content from lazymuscle and RRRshow, this telugu podcast episode is made for you. It talks about crime, public safety, money systems, and environment in a way that feels like a conversation, not a lecture. Watch it fully to understand how hidden networks influence daily life and why informed citizens play a key role in building a safer society.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #rrrshow #rohithgollena #teluguinterviews #telugupodcastclips #indianpodcast #hyderabadpodcast #socialissuesindia #crimeawareness #begging #publicsafety #hawalasystem #blackmoneyindia #realestatescams #justiceandinjustice #phonetappingcase #musiriver #urbancrime #telugucontent #telugucreator #teluguyoutube #awarenesspodcast

item.title: Going Dutch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Going Dutch.

In Going Dutch a decorated, hard-ass colonel is tasked with running the least important U.S. Army base in the world, located in the tulip-hugging, wine-chugging Netherlands.

item.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite.

WarnerMedia announced today that it is partnering with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), the new professional wrestling promotion featuring a world-class roster of diverse male and female wrestlers, giving fans a new wrestling experience for the first time in 20 years. WarnerMedia and AEW together will build this powerhouse sporting league from the ground up and will begin airing weekly matches later this year. With this league, AEW is introducing a new generation of wrestlers to fans, offering fun, gripping and authentic athletic matches that will make wrestling more accessible to a broad audience.

item.title: 7 LEVELS Of Kubernetes You MUST-KNOW | Vishkha Sadhwani
item.description:
After working with real production clusters and mentoring learners, one pattern is clear: Kubernetes mastery is layered.
From core objects and debugging crash loops to GitOps, observability, and multi-cluster design, each stage builds on the previous one.
If you treat Kubernetes as a progression instead of a checklist, you stop memorizing YAML and start thinking like an architect. Master each level, and you become job-ready faster.
Follow me also on, Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: 5 High-Paying Cloud Jobs In 2026 | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: 5 High-Paying Cloud Jobs In 2026
Most people think “cloud” is just DevOps or basic infra. It’s not.
The real money is in roles that sit at the intersection of cloud, AI, security, and scale.
From engineers running LLMs in production, to SREs keeping massive platforms alive, to architects designing end-to-end AI systems, these jobs didn’t even exist a few years ago, and now companies can’t hire fast enough.
If you want roles that are future-proof, high-impact, and actually pay at the top of the market, these are the ones to watch.
I’ve broken down what they do, why they pay so much, and how to get there in a full-fledged video on my YouTube channel.
Follow me also on, Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀
-----------------------------------------------

item.title: iPhones are changing colour!
Top Skills For 2026 Cloud Jobs | DevOps vs SRE vs Cloud | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Check out Anyshift: https://www.anyshift.io/main
In this video, I've broken down the real difference between DevOps, Site Reliability Engineering (SRE), and Cloud Engineering in 2026, including how AI is changing each role, what hiring managers actually evaluate, and what makes you instantly hireable.
Most people think these roles are the same because they use similar tools like Linux, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform, and cloud platforms like AWS, GCP, or Azure. But the responsibilities, interview expectations, failure handling, and AI impact are completely different. And, If you're also confused about which path to choose, this will give you a lot of clarity.
Subscribe for more content on cloud careers, AI infrastructure, DevOps interview prep, and getting hired in tech.

item.title: STOP Scrolling! Watch THESE Instead!
item.description:
This week, I went deep into content that actually helped me improve myself as an engineer. I learnt about private AI assistants, real-world AIOps, and also spent time learning how AI workloads scale on Kubernetes.
No noise. Just high-signal blogs, videos, and books that will sharpen your technical skills.
Follow me also on, Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀
-----------------------------------------------

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Psycho Killer’
item.description: Opening in theaters on February 20 is ‘Psycho Killer,’ directed by Gavin Polone and starring Georgina Campbell, James Preston Rogers, Logan Miller, Grace Dove, and Malcolm McDowell.Related Article: Joe Keery and Georgina Campbell Talk New Horror Comedy 'Cold Storage'Initial ThoughtsFilmed in 2023 and collecting dust since then, ‘Psycho Killer’ boasts a rising star in Georgina Campbell, a script by ‘Seven’ scribe Andrew Kevin Walker, and the backing of producers behind films like ‘Barbarian’ and ‘Weapons.

item.title: Modi & Netanyahu -vs- Tinubu on Terrorism: Breakdown Viral Claims Nigeria's response to terrorism
item.description:
follow us on X @ x.com/speaknsee follow us on Rumble @ speaknseeRumble follow us on Facebook @ https://www.facebook.com/speaknsee
Also join the Patron @ speaknsee.com website.
In this video, we dive into the current affairs surrounding Nigeria's leadership and its international relations. We compare Nigeria's leader to pm modi of India, discussing who Nigeria should have called for better results. The discussion also touches upon african politics and the recent deployment of us military troops to the region.
0:00 Introduction to Terrorism Management Comparison 2:00 Nigeria's Approach and Challenges 5:00 India's Decisive Actions (e.g., Operation Sindoor) 8:00 Israel's Targeted Strategies 9:00 Conclusion and Call to Action

item.title: 5 New FREE AI Courses By NVIDIA For 2026!
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: 5 New FREE AI Courses By NVIDIA For 2026!
THIS is one of the best free AI learning stacks out there!
From Generative AI fundamentals to LLMs with RAG, Jetson Nano, CUDA, and even agengtic AI, this covers both software + hardware sides of modern AI, and you’ll also learn how the same concepts are used in real-world systems today.
Whether you’re • just starting out and want a strong AI foundation • already working in tech and want to level up • or trying to connect AI with systems, performance, and scale These courses are perfect!
And again, they’re all by NVIDIA, which alone should tell you the quality.

item.title: 8 YEARS Of Cloud & DevOps In 8 MINUTES (By An Ex-Google, Ex-Amazon Engineer) | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
If you’re aiming for high paying jobs in Cloud, DevOps, AI, or Big Tech, this video is for you.
I’ve broken down my complete career roadmap, from Cloud Support at AWS, Cloud Architect at Google, and now, to Solutions Architect at NVIDIA.
I’ve shared practical career advice, the exact technical skills I built, certifications I used strategically, interview lessons I learned, and the decision-making frameworks that helped me grow inside Amazon, Google, and now NVIDIA.
This is real-world career growth, skill development, and long-term strategy for anyone serious about building a strong tech career. If you’re looking for career advice, motivation, personal growth, and clarity on how to build high-income skills in tech, this video will help you take smarter steps earlier in your journey.

item.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms.

A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.

item.title: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy.

Star Trek: Starfleet Academy is set in the 32nd century, a time period in the far-future of the Star Trek franchise where Starfleet and the United Federation of Planets are recovering from a cataclysmic event, as depicted in Star Trek: Discovery. It introduces viewers to a young group of cadets who come together to pursue a common dream of hope and optimism. Under the watchful and demanding eyes of their instructors, they discover what it takes to become Starfleet officers as they navigate blossoming friendships, explosive rivalries, first loves and a new enemy that threatens both the Academy and the Federation itself.

item.title: Azure Data Engineering Demo for Beginners | Walkthrough
item.description:
In this Azure Data Engineering demo, we walk through an end-to-end mini project using real-world scenarios. You will learn how modern data pipelines are built on Microsoft Azure using core services like Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, Azure Synapse, and Azure Storage.
What you will learn: - Azure Data Engineering basics (ETL vs ELT, batch vs streaming) - Designing a simple data pipeline end-to-end - Ingesting data into Azure Data Lake Storage - Transformations using Azure Databricks / Spark - Loading data into a reporting/analytics layer - Best practices, tips and common interview points
Who is this for: - Freshers looking for Azure Data Engineer roles - Manual testers / support engineers planning to switch to data engineering - Working professionals moving from SQL / BI / On‑Prem to Azure - Anyone preparing for Azure Data Engineer interviews
Azure Data Engineering demo, Azure Data Engineer tutorial, Azure data pipeline project, Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, Azure Synapse, Azure Data Lake, data engineering for beginners, Azure data engineer for freshers, RPA Vault of Trainings
Subscribe to the channel for more step‑by‑step Azure Data Engineering, RPA and automation tutorials.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Shelter’
item.description: Opening in theaters on January 30 is ‘Shelter,’ directed by Ric Roman Waugh and starring Jason Statham, Bodhi Rae Breathnach, Naomi Ackie, Daniel Mays, Bryan Vigier, and Bill Nighy.Related Article: Jason Statham and Director Guy Ritchie to Reunite for ‘Viva La Madness'Initial ThoughtsJason Statham is the AC/DC of action movies: just as the legendary Australian band has made the same album 17 times, Statham makes more or less the same movie every year and portrays pretty much the same character each time out.

item.title: What is IDP in Databricks?
item.description:
Try it for Free Here: https://bit.ly/aa-dbxfree
IDP in Databricks is used to help speed up the process of transforming unstructured data into structured, usable data. It's not an easy process, but IDP makes it much easier!
IDP Documentation: https://www.databricks.com/blog/pdfs-production-announcing-state-art-document-intelligence-databricks

item.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City.

The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City takes viewers into an undiscovered world that is about so much more than religion, although the Mormon church is undeniably engrained in the culture. In the majestic mountains of Utah is a hidden social circle made up of successful women who have created their own paradise filled with luxury homes, shopping sprees and multi-million-dollar businesses and brands. With Hollywood's exclusive Sundance Film Festival in their backyards, these Type-A power-brokers are accustomed to rubbing elbows with A-listers and what party list you are on means everything. They have mastered running wildly successful enterprises by day and enjoy après ski at the finest resorts by night, all the while raising extraordinary and unconventional families. Here perfection is not an aspiration, it's a mandate. They hold themselves and each other to an extremely high standard and never hold back when things go sideways, but lord knows they are always there for each other when they need it most.

item.title: 10 Best Female-Lead Action Movies of 2025
item.description:
Female-led action movies made a massive comeback this year. Leading the game was Ballerina, a high-octane entry from the John Wick universe that dominated the global box office and was loved by fans around the world. Alongside it, we also saw several jaw-dropping releases packed with thrilling action and heart stopping stunts. Now buckle up as we count down the best female-driven action movies of 2025. Let's get started!
00:00 – Intro 00:24 – Ballerina 01:22 – G20 02:26 – Thunderbolts* 03:30 – Ash 04:30 – The Old Guard 2 05:29 – The Gorge 06:39 – Cleaner 07:28 – K-Pop: Demon Hunters 08:39 – Predator: Badlands 09:40 – Jurassic World Rebirth

item.title: Tracker
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Tracker.

Tracker features lone-wolf survivalist Colter Shaw, who roams the country as a "reward seeker," using his expert tracking skills to help private citizens and law enforcement to solve all manner of mysteries while contending with his own fractured family.

item.title: The War Between the Land and the Sea
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The War Between the Land and the Sea.

When a fearsome and ancient species emerges from the ocean, dramatically revealing themselves to humanity, an international crisis is triggered. With the entire population at risk, UNIT step into action as the land and sea wage war.

item.title: Spartacus: House of Ashur
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Spartacus: House of Ashur.

Spartacus: House of Ashur poses the question: What if Ashur hadn't died on Mount Vesuvius at the end of Spartacus: Vengeance? And what if he had been gifted the gladiator school once owned by Batiatus in return for aiding the Romans in killing Spartacus and ending the slave rebellion?

item.title: 10 SPELLBINDING Fantasy Movies on Netflix
item.description:

And don’t forget to subscribe!

For three police recruits in Belfast, the pressure is immense. Facing criminal gangs and divided communities, they don't know who to trust. The odds are they won't all make it.

History's Greatest Mysteries
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: History's Greatest Mysteries.

History's Greatest Mysteries will investigate a wide range of historically compelling topics and the mysteries surrounding each including the Titanic, D.B. Cooper, Roswell, John Wilkes Booth, and more. Each program within the franchise will showcase fresh, new evidence and perspectives including never-before-released documents to the general public, personal diaries and DNA evidence to unearth brand-new information about these infamous and enigmatic chapters in history.

item.title: 10 Netflix Fantasy Series That Deserve More Hype
item.description: Just finished watching Netflix’s Stranger Things Season 5? Then these fantasy shows should be next on your list. From big, adventurous quests to dark mystery-filled worlds, these series cover every kind of fantasy you can think of. Some are underrated gems, others are already fan favorites. In today’s video, we’re breaking down the best Netflix fantasy shows you can binge right now. And before we jump in, make sure to subscribe, like, and drop a comment below. 00:00 Intro 00:25 The Irregulars 01:28 Warrior Nun 02:33 Lucifer 03:40 The Shannara Chronicles 04:52 The Nevers 06:07 A Discovery of Witches 07:12 Preacher 08:18 Locke & Key 09:27 Shadow and Bone 10:39 One Piece

item.title: The Gentlemen
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Gentlemen.

When aristocratic Eddie inherits the family estate, he discovers that it's home to an enormous weed empire — and its proprietors aren't going anywhere.

item.title: SpyxFamily
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: SpyxFamily.

Master spy Twilight is the best at what he does when it comes to going undercover on dangerous missions in the name of a better world. But when he receives the ultimate impossible assignment—get married and have a kid—he may finally be in over his head! Not one to depend on others, Twilight has his work cut out for him procuring both a wife and a child for his mission to infiltrate an elite private school. What he doesn't know is that the wife he's chosen is an assassin and the child he's adopted is a telepath!

item.title: Smiling Friends
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Smiling Friends.

Smiling Friends is a hit animated comedy co-created and starring Michael Cusack and Zach Hadel that follows the employees of a small company dedicated to bringing happiness to a bizarre yet colorful world.

item.title: 10 Martial Arts Action Movies of 2025 So Far
item.description:
Every year, we get plenty of action movies, but martial arts films are something true action fans crave for their realism and their ability to tell powerful stories. These movies aren’t just about punches and kicks; they also reveal real character and emotion behind every battle. That’s why in today’s video, we’ve rounded up the best martial arts action movies of 2025 that will definitely keep you on the edge of your seat. Let’s get started.
00:23 intro 00:23 Demon City 01:25 Diablo 02:35 Nobody 2 03:34 Fight or Flight 04:46 Mantis 05:56 Karate Kid Legends 07:04 Havoc 08:19 Love Hurts 09:37 The Furious (2025) 10:47 Last Samurai Standing

item.title: Down Cemetery Road
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Down Cemetery Road.

When a house explodes in a quiet Oxford suburb and a girl disappears in the aftermath, neighbor Sarah Trafford becomes obsessed with finding her and enlists the help of private investigator Zoë Boehm. Zoë and Sarah suddenly find themselves in a complex conspiracy that reveals that people long believed dead are still among the living, while the living are fast joining the dead.

item.title: Anne's Rice Talamasca: The Secret Order
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Anne's Rice Talamasca: The Secret Order.

Anne Rice's Talamasca: The Secret Order focuses on a secretive society called the Talamasca, comprised of the men and women responsible for tracking and containing the witches, vampires, and other creatures scattered around the globe.

item.title: 9-1-1: Nashville
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: 9-1-1: Nashville.

A high-octane procedural about heroic first responders, as well as their family saga of power and glamour set in one of America's most diverse and dynamic cities.

item.title: Boston Blue
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Boston Blue.

In Boston Blue, NYPD Detective Danny Reagan takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with Detective Lena Silver, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.
